title: Amtech L0665 General Purpose Screwdriver Set, 6Pcs, 3 Pozi & 3 Slotted, Non-Slip Handles, Durable Carbon Steel Shafts
features: DURABLE: These screwdrivers have chrome plated and hardened carbon steel shafts for durability
VERSATILE: This handy set includes 3 Pozidriv (PZ 1 x 75mm, PZ2 x 100mm, PZ3 x 150mm) and 3 slotted (3 x 75mm, 5 x 100mm, 6 x 100mm) screwdrivers
SAFE AND EASY TO USE: They have non-slip, two-tone soft grip handles for comfort and ease of use
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
